[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T18:03 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

Deacon checking in. I have work hooked - let me execute immediately per the propulsion principle.

The hook shows: `skogtown-wisp-wisp-08bbjp` - a mol-deacon-patrol epic. All children are marked as completed (✓). Let me check the current state.

Let me start by updating heartbeat and checking the current mol status.
